_note: SEED GOLD EVAL SET (G0, AC-109) over this repo's own indexed source tree (services/memory-mcp, services/codebase-mcp, services/secrets-mcp). Each row is query -> relevant FILE PATH(s); a hit on ANY relevant path in the top-k counts as recall. Paths are matched case-insensitively (leading ./ stripped) by the scorer. Labels are CANONICAL paths only — never `.claude/worktrees/**` duplicates. The test split is spent only by flip gates.
_archetypes: where-is-X (subsystem location), how-do-we-X (mechanism), symbol-lookup (named function/type), route->handler trace, cross-file usage. The `archetype` field on each row is informational only (the loader ignores it).
changelog: 2026-07-03: v2 — rows gain stable id (c-001..c-052), split (all "dev"; operator promotes ~1/3 to "test" at G0 and freezes it — the test split is modified only by flip gates, AC-109) and provenance (seed-v1, from the _seed flag). Paths remain the stable ID for code (chunk ids churn on every reindex).
2026-07-03: G0 curation — all 52 seed rows' relevantPaths verified to exist by exact match in codebase.files.
2026-07-03: c-001 — sibling auth.ts added (memory-mcp, secrets-mcp: near-identical requireBearer) + query scoped to 'MCP services' (this repo indexes only its own three MCP services).
2026-07-03: c-002 — memory-mcp cfAccess.ts added (byte-identical file).
2026-07-03: c-003 — sibling origin.ts added (memory-mcp byte-identical, secrets-mcp comment-only diff).
2026-07-03: c-004 — sibling db/pool.ts added (memory-mcp identical, secrets-mcp max-size-only diff).
2026-07-03: c-005 — memory-mcp db/migrate.ts added (near-identical startup migration runner).
2026-07-03: c-006 — memory-mcp voyage.ts added (same 429-retry Voyage client).
2026-07-03: c-012 — query scoped to 'codebase MCP' (all three MCP servers register tools; server.ts bodies diverge, so scoping keeps the row discriminative).
2026-07-03: c-014 — query scoped to the codebase MCP service (three sibling config.ts with divergent bodies).
2026-07-03: c-016 — memory-mcp voyage.ts added (same toVectorLiteral serializer).
2026-07-03: c-020 — query scoped to the Voyage client + memory-mcp voyage.ts added (identical backoff).
2026-07-03: c-025 — query scoped to the CODE embedder bake-off (memory-mcp carries a sibling recall/MRR helper for its own gate).
2026-07-03: c-032 — memory-mcp voyage.ts added (defines the same toVectorLiteral symbol).
2026-07-03: c-033 — sibling config.ts added (assertServerConfig defined in all three services).
2026-07-03: c-034 — query fixed: the symbol is requireBearer (verifyBearer never existed); sibling auth.ts added (defined in all three services).
2026-07-03: c-035 — query scoped to Voyage (memory-mcp shares the same rerank export).
2026-07-03: c-042 — query scoped to 'codebase MCP' (origin.ts is identical across the three services; the server.ts wiring target stays discriminative).
2026-07-03: c-043 — query scoped to CODE search (memory-mcp shares the CANDIDATE_POOL env/config name).
2026-07-03: c-045 — query scoped to the code chunk column (memory-mcp sql also defines halfvec(1024) columns).
2026-07-03: c-049 — sql/005_drop_bakeoff_scratch.sql added (create + drop are both 'the bake-off scratch embedding column migration').
2026-07-03: c-052 — memory-mcp db/create-decision-index.ts added (same concurrent-HNSW-outside-the-batch-runner pattern).

2026-07-21: sanitized for the public template repo — the original 15 'distilled' rows (c-053..c-067) scored a private downstream product's codebase and were removed along with every cross-project reference in this changelog and _note. The remaining 52 seed-v1 rows score ONLY this repo's own services/ tree, so they work out of the box against a fresh clone + index — no other corpus required. Grow your own gold set for your own codebase via the distill/harvest workflow in test/eval.md.
